attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
1 AS BATCH_ID
,CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LINE_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SOURCE_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SOURCE_TABLE
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SOURCE_TYPE
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CODE_COMBINATION_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_DR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.AMOUNT_CR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ACCTD_AMOUNT_DR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ACCTD_AMOUNT_CR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CREATION_DATE
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CREATED_BY
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ORG_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SOURCE_TABLE_SECONDARY
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SOURCE_ID_SECONDARY
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CURRENCY_CODE
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_RATE
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_TYPE
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DATE
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TAXABLE_ENTERED_DR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TAXABLE_ENTERED_CR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TAXABLE_ACCOUNTED_DR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TAXABLE_ACCOUNTED_CR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TAX_LINK_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.THIRD_PARTY_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.THIRD_PARTY_SUB_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REVERSED_SOURCE_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TAX_CODE_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.LOCATION_SEGMENT_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SOURCE_TYPE_SECONDARY
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.TAX_GROUP_CODE_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REF_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REF_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REF_ACCOUNT_CLASS
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.ACTIVITY_BUCKET
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REF_LINE_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.FROM_AMOUNT_DR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.FROM_AMOUNT_CR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.FROM_ACCTD_AMOUNT_DR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.FROM_ACCTD_AMOUNT_CR
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REF_MF_DIST_FLAG
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REF_DIST_CCID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.REF_PREV_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
, CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
, 'CDC'AS GLOBAL_NAME  
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME               
,'I' as ACTION_CODE
FROM
(
SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND ORG_ID NOT IN (SEL ORG_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_ENABLED_ORG)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY LINE_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
)CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL
WHERE CDC_AR_DISTRIBUTIONS_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
